steps.title: Use the hypothesis clue
steps.content: The sentence says corpus analysis can support the idea that own has a high incidence in English. The blank therefore needs a noun for an unproven assumption that can be tested with evidence.

steps.title: Reject mismatched nouns
steps.content: Choice A means a summary. Choice B means a plan or plot. Choice C means acknowledgment of something already known. The needed word means a belief or assumption made before proof. The answer is D.
